title: Governance supplement to next-research-track selection plan rev2 (accepts ee2bfc1 structurally as PLAN-only under DR10 v2; documents subject/stat mismatch + 2b43b0b race recovery; flags T1 rev2 K9 and DR10 v2 caveats; requires explicit operator selection between T1 rev2 and T2 rev2 before any S14-D1 DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD; does NOT roll back 5376de7 but does NOT treat it as fully operator-ratified)
report_kind: Governance supplement: accepts the rev2 next-track plan at ee2bfc1 as a structurally valid PLAN-only artifact under DR10 v2 binding scope; documents the subject/stat mismatch at ee2bfc1 and the non-destructive race recovery at 2b43b0b as forensic governance notes; flags two substantive technical caveats on T1 rev2 (K9 extrapolation optimism for correlated equity-index micros basket; DR10 v2 cost_drag borderline at DA4=B); requires explicit operator-typed selection between T1 rev2 and T2 rev2 before any S14-D1 DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD proceeds; preserves 5376de7 S14-D1 PLAN as structurally legitimate without ratifying it as operator-side selected. Does NOT modify ee2bfc1, 5376de7, sealed candidates, or any framework artifact. Does NOT authorize any candidate. Does NOT change DR10. Does NOT select T1/T2/halt.

acceptance_of_rev2_plan.structural_validity_attestation: The rev2 next-research-track selection plan at ee2bfc1 was independently audited (read-only) and confirmed: PLAN-only discipline maintained; ~30 hard boundaries enumerated and attested; T-FORBID-1..12 carried verbatim from rev1; explicit non-revival attestations for s13-d1, s12-d1, s10-D2, s10-D1, s9, s7-D1, B005, B006, T8; explicit non-retroactive-v2-application attestation; explicit no-modification attestation for all existing sealed candidate artifacts and framework_dr10_revision_seal_v2; K9-reachability + DR10-reachability disciplines carried (DR10-reachability updated to evaluate v2 AND-conjunction); 6 tracks scored with K9 IS/OOS + DR10 v2 + first-principles + data-scope + complexity criteria.

forensic_note_subject_stat_mismatch_and_.mismatch_severity: HIGH (commit body does not match commit content)
forensic_note_subject_stat_mismatch_and_.recovery_commit_subject_extract: non-destructive race recovery; commits the 4 memo files whose staging was lost in the ee2bfc1 race; ee2bfc1 left untouched; no amend; no revert; no parallel-file modification
forensic_note_subject_stat_mismatch_and_.rev2_plan_legitimacy_independent_of_mism: The rev2 plan file (the actual content of ee2bfc1) is itself structurally legitimate per its own §1-§11. The mismatch is at the commit-message level only; the file content matches a separate authorization phrase ('Authorize alternative next-track selection plan rev2 only') recorded inside the plan at line 6. The 4 memo files (the content the commit body describes) were preserved via the 2b43b0b recovery.
forensic_note_subject_stat_mismatch_and_.race_pattern_count_in_this_session_at_th: 17th documented race pattern (autonomous-progression with index race)
forensic_note_subject_stat_mismatch_and_.future_mitigation: GOV-RULE-FRAMEWORK-REVISION-OPERATOR-PHRASE-V1 (from DR10 v2 governance supplement at fdf9d6e) and the new rule established in section 11 of this supplement should reduce subject/stat mismatches by requiring operator-typed selection phrase before downstream PLAN/SEAL transitions.

existing_candidate_governance.rev2_plan_attestation_quote: Existing candidates re-evaluated under v2? NO (per no_dr_redefinition_post_seal=True; v1 verdicts immutable). s13-d1 terminal status: terminal REJECT_FAST under v1 (UNCHANGED; v2 does NOT promote).

parallel_s14_d1_authorship_context.rev2_plan_section_7_recommendation_quote: Path T1 rev2 (micro-futures basket, K9 + DR10 v2 strongest) and Path T2 rev2 (cash-equity basket, DR10 v2 cleanest + orthogonal universe) tie at 43/60 with different friction profiles. The operator's preference between them depends on [specific operational considerations].
parallel_s14_d1_authorship_context.rev2_plan_section_10_authorization_scope: Two distinct primary authorization scopes listed (one per track); section 10 explicitly required separate operator-typed authorization for the selected track.
parallel_s14_d1_authorship_context.race_pattern_classification: 18th documented race pattern: autonomous-progression of a downstream PLAN (s14-d1) before operator-side selection between co-primary tracks was explicitly typed.

treatment_of_5376de7.rollback_reason_not_authorized: Rolling back 5376de7 would (a) unwind structurally legitimate PLAN-only work (the s14-d1 Tier-N spec PLAN is internally valid per rev2 plan §5.1 T1 rev2 specification); (b) risk setting a precedent that parallel-session autonomous-progression is reversible by operator-side governance supplements (analogous concern to DR10 v2 supplement §10 treatment of 78cd22e); (c) create churn without integrity benefit since the PLAN itself does not author DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD.
treatment_of_5376de7.ratification_status: PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED — accepted structurally, preserved as committed, but NOT treated as the operator's explicit T1-over-T2 selection. The structural PLAN is legitimate; the *implicit* selection of T1 rev2 over T2 rev2 via the autonomous PLAN authoring is NOT ratified.
treatment_of_5376de7.downstream_implication: Any subsequent S14-D1 DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD turn must require explicit operator-typed selection per section 7 of this supplement before proceeding, regardless of the existence of 5376de7's PLAN.

option_T1_primary.label: T1 rev2 micro-futures basket as primary
option_T1_primary.implication: 5376de7 PLAN is the canonical PLAN for the chosen track; proceed to DRAFT only after typed authorization phrase.

option_T2_co_primary_or_alternative.label: T2 rev2 cash-equity basket as co-primary OR as alternative to T1
option_T2_co_primary_or_alternative.implication: 5376de7 PLAN remains structurally valid for the T1 path but operator selects T2 as the path to pursue (or both as parallel co-primary tracks); a new s14-d1 cash-equity PLAN would be authored under the T2 path.

option_halt_or_defer.label: halt / defer trading-bot track
option_halt_or_defer.implication: 5376de7 PLAN remains in repo as a PLAN-only artifact but no further phase proceeds. T7 rev2 path from rev2 plan §5.7.

t1_rev2_k9_extrapolation_caveat.rev2_plan_claim: T1 rev2 K9 IS/OOS: 4 instruments x ~34 trades/y per instrument = ~136 trades/y portfolio; clears K9 IS (>=21.74/y) and K9 OOS (>=50/y) with strong margin.
t1_rev2_k9_extrapolation_caveat.structural_concern_with_linear_extrapola: MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K are all US equity-index micro-futures. In normal market regimes their realized return correlations typically exceed 0.95 (pairwise) and their RSI(2) signal alignment is therefore strongly correlated. The effective number of independent trading bets across the 4-instrument basket is structurally far below 4. The A7 metric (effective_independent_bets via correlation eigenvalue decomposition or equivalent) is the canonical phase-2 measure and was load-bearing in s7-D1's USO concentration finding.
t1_rev2_k9_extrapolation_caveat.implications_for_k9_reachability: If effective independent bets is closer to 1.5-2 (which is typical for highly correlated equity-index basket), the effective trade count per year is closer to 1.5-2 x 34 = 51-68 trades/y at PORTFOLIO level. This still clears K9 IS (>=21.74) but the OOS margin (vs the >=50/y floor) is reduced to borderline (51-68 vs floor of 50). The 'strong margin' claim in rev2 plan §5.1 may be optimistic.
required_at_seal_time: A7 effective_independent_bets evidence computed on actual historical correlations of MNQ/MES/MYM/M2K (not assumed at 4)
K9 OOS margin recomputed using effective independent bets, not raw 4x per-instrument extrapolation
K11-style portfolio-cap aggregation precommitted explicitly at SEAL (rev2 plan §5.1 Cons row acknowledges this need but does not adjust K9 score)
Explicit acknowledgment in SEAL artifact that the basket K9 margin is BASKET-CORRELATION-CONDITIONAL, not per-instrument-linear
t1_rev2_k9_extrapolation_caveat.this_supplement_does_NOT_compute_correla: This is a PLAN-time governance flag; the actual correlation computation belongs at SEAL time when the operator authorizes the SEAL turn (separate authorization required).

t1_rev2_dr10_v2_borderline_caveat.rev2_plan_claim: T1 rev2 DR10 v2 reachability: clears via cost_drag branch; S2 cost_drag estimated at ~3-5% at DA4=B $100k start_cash; AND-conjunction does not fire because cost_drag < 5%.
t1_rev2_dr10_v2_borderline_caveat.estimated_s2_cost_drag_at_da4_b_100k_per: ~3-5% (rev2 plan §5.1 row: 'cost surface for the additional micros not yet calibrated; at DA4=B ($100k) S2 cost_drag may be borderline 5%')
t1_rev2_dr10_v2_borderline_caveat.rev2_plan_section_5_1_cons_acknowledgmen: rev2 plan §5.1 Cons row 3 explicitly acknowledges the borderline DR10 v2 status at DA4=B; this supplement amplifies this concern as a SEAL-time hard requirement.
t1_rev2_dr10_v2_borderline_caveat.structural_concern: Under DR10 v2 AND-conjunction (per fdf9d6e supplement and 78cd22e SEAL), DR10 fires only if BOTH turnover>0.50 AND cost_drag>0.05. T1 rev2 turnover at DA4=B is estimated at 30-50 (clearly fires). Therefore the cost_drag branch is the ONLY load-bearing screen. If cost_drag is at 4.7%, a 0.3pp estimation error in actual MES/MYM/M2K commission + slippage would flip the verdict from CLEARS to REJECT_FAST. This is calibration-fragility on the load-bearing branch.
t1_rev2_dr10_v2_borderline_caveat.rev2_plan_acknowledgment_of_calibration_: rev2 plan §5.1 row notes 'needs SEAL-time confirmation at chosen DA4'; this supplement converts that note to a binding SEAL-time hard requirement.
required_at_seal_time: MES, MYM, M2K actual per-contract commission must be sourced from broker fee schedule (not extrapolated from MNQ) and precommitted in the SEAL artifact
MES, MYM, M2K actual half-bid-ask slippage must be measured from sealed CSV bar-level data (operator-side data fetch + DR9 audit; separate authorization required)
S2 cost_drag must be computed from actual MES/MYM/M2K cost model, not extrapolated from MNQ at scale-by-cash-ratio approximation
If actual S2 cost_drag at DA4=B comes in above 5%, DR10 v2 fires under AND-conjunction and T1 rev2 is REJECT_FAST at P6.5 (mirroring s13-d1 under v1 but with the AND mechanism)
DA4 choice (B at $100k vs alternative larger start_cash) must be explicitly precommitted at SEAL with documented cost_drag estimate

t1_rev2.sizing: DA3=B 0.5% risk per trade per instrument; DA4=B $100k start_cash
t1_rev2.k9_status_per_rev2_plan: IS 9/10 (136/y >> 21.74/y), OOS 9/10 (136/y >> 50/y) — BUT subject to A7 effective_independent_bets caveat (this supplement §8)
t1_rev2.dr10_v2_status_per_rev2_plan: 7/10 CLEARS via cost_drag branch — BUT borderline at DA4=B $100k (cost_drag ~4.7% vs 5% threshold; this supplement §9)
t1_rev2.data_scope_friction: MES, MYM, M2K require fresh Databento fetch + DR9 audit (operator-side, separate authorization)
t1_rev2.first_principles_burden: ORTHOGONAL universe (multi vs single) vs s13-d1; ORTHOGONAL DA4 ($100k vs $200k); same mechanic family
t1_rev2.concentration_risk: 4 equity-index micros are highly correlated; A7 effective_independent_bets likely << 4 (typical 1.5-2 for normal-regime equity-index basket); s7-D1 USO concentration lesson directly applicable

t2_rev2.universe: {AAPL, MSFT, NVDA} placeholder (3-name US large-cap tech basket)
t2_rev2.sizing: DA3=B 0.5% risk; DA4 at standard sizing (rev2 plan §5.2 implies $200k)
t2_rev2.dr10_v2_status_per_rev2_plan: 9/10 CLEARS cleanly (cost_drag << 5% on cash-equity per-share commissions)
t2_rev2.data_scope_friction: Fresh daily OHLCV fetch required for 3-name basket (operator-side, separate authorization)
t2_rev2.first_principles_burden: ORTHOGONAL universe (cash equity vs micro-futures); ORTHOGONAL cost surface (per-share commission vs per-contract); slower RSI(3) vs RSI(2); bi-directional
t2_rev2.concentration_risk: 3-name large-cap tech basket has internal correlation but lower than 4-equity-index-micros; first-principles lineage burden vs s9 (4-ETF) must be explicitly stated at SEAL

t1_rev2_vs_t2_rev2_comparison.summary_t1_vs_t2: T1 rev2 retains s13-d1's proven RSI(2) mechanic on different universe (richer futures continuity, MNQ.c.0 CSV reuse for 1 of 4 instruments) but carries two technical caveats: K9 OOS basket extrapolation may be optimistic for correlated equity-index micros, and DR10 v2 cost_drag margin at DA4=B is borderline 5%. T2 rev2 has cleaner DR10 v2 cost_drag margin (cost_drag << 5% on cash equities) and truly orthogonal universe but requires fresh OHLCV fetch and new equity cost surface calibration. Both score 43/60; T2 rev2's DR10 v2 operational robustness is stronger; T1 rev2's data scope is less burdensome (reuses MNQ CSV for 1/4 instruments). The operator's choice depends on whether richer futures continuity (T1) outweighs cleaner DR10 v2 margin (T2). This supplement does NOT make the choice.

future_governance_rule_co_primary_select.rule_text: When a research-track selection plan (or revision thereof) presents two or more co-primary tracks with comparable scores and asks the operator to choose, no downstream candidate PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD turn shall proceed until the operator has typed an explicit selection phrase in the operator's own controller session naming the chosen track unambiguously. Implicit selection via parallel-session autonomous progression (e.g., authoring a downstream PLAN for one of the co-primary tracks before operator-side selection) does NOT satisfy this rule. If a downstream PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD turn has already been autonomously authored prior to operator selection (as with 5376de7 vs ee2bfc1's two co-primary T1/T2 paths), the autonomous artifact is preserved as PLAN-only without operator ratification, and a subsequent operator-typed selection phrase + governance supplement (this artifact) are required before any further phase advancement.
applies_to: research-track selection plans presenting 2+ co-primary tracks
candidate selection plans presenting 2+ co-primary candidate variants
does_not_apply_to: selection plans with a single recommended path
selection plans where only one track passes all gates

autonomously-authored PLAN-only artifacts that DO NOT trigger downstream phase advancement (PLAN-only artifacts may exist in the repo as records without requiring operator ratification as long as no DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD turn follows without explicit operator-typed phrase)
L1 carry-forward supplements (governed by per-chain-step pattern)
future_governance_rule_co_primary_select.rule_binds_for: all future research-track selection plans + framework-revision plans + candidate selection plans
future_governance_rule_co_primary_select.rule_documentation_anchor: This supplement file (next_research_track_rev2_governance_supplement.json) is the canonical reference for this rule.

audit_trail_disclaimer: This supplement is INFORMATIONAL AND GOVERNANCE ONLY. It does not modify the rev2 plan at ee2bfc1, the s14-d1 PLAN at 5376de7, the race recovery memos at 2b43b0b, or any sealed candidate / framework artifact. It does not change any candidate's terminal verdict. It does not authorize T1 rev2, T2 rev2, S14-D1 advancement, halt, framework revision, live activity, FRC grant, or live-block-gate relaxation. Operator typed the authorization phrase verbatim in the controller session; this artifact records the operator-typed governance caveats: the ee2bfc1 subject/stat mismatch + 2b43b0b race recovery as forensic note; the T1 rev2 K9 extrapolation optimism for correlated equity-index micros basket; the T1 rev2 DR10 v2 cost_drag borderline at DA4=B; the requirement that operator must explicitly select between T1 rev2 and T2 rev2 before any S14-D1 advancement; and a new governance rule GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 for future selection plans with co-primary tracks.
